name: Metroidvania Starter
description: Interconnected world map with ability-gated exploration. Player progresses through unlocking new movement abilities (wall jump, dash, double jump, down smash) that open previously inaccessible areas. Features seamless room transitions, persistent map tracking with fog of war, enemy variety with AI patterns, boss encounters with phase mechanics, and save stations for progress persistence.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x project configuration with input mappings for movement, jump, dash, ability usage

scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D root with CollisionShape2D, AnimatedSprite2D with idle/run/jump/fall/wall_slide/dash animations. Equipped with Area2D for ability range checks.

world/.room_template.tscn: Node2D base room scene with TileMap, static obstacles (StaticBody2D), hazards (Area2D spike tiles), camera limit triggers, room transition points (Area2D at edges)
world/.room_start.tscn: Extends room_template with spawn point, initial enemies, tutorial hints
world/.boss_room.tscn: Extends room_template with phase arena boundaries, attack pattern visualization zones, phase transition visual effects

enemies/.crawler.tscn: CharacterBody2D with patrol AI, melee range detector, knockback on hit, drop items on death
enemies/.flyer.tscn: CharacterBody2D with flying movement, circular patrol patterns, shoot projectiles, altitude variation
enemies/.boss_base.tscn: CharacterBody2D with HealthComponent, phase state machine (3+ phases), unique attack patterns per phase, visual feedback on phase change

items/.ability_orb.tscn: Area2D with AnimatedSprite2D (glowing particles), defines ability type (WallJump, Dash, DoubleJump, DownSmash), plays collect sound
items/.health_upgrade.tscn: Area2D collectible that increases max health, uses particle effect on collection

ui/.map_screen.tscn: CanvasLayer with TileMap overlay showing explored rooms (revealed) vs unexplored (fog of war), current position marker, ability icons overlay
ui/.ability_display.tscn: CanvasLayer showing active abilities with icons, cooldown timers for dash/other abilities
ui/.health_bar.tscn: CanvasLayer with current/max health bar, damage flash effect, healing animation

scenes/.save_station.tscn: StaticBody2D with interaction Area2D, visual pillar/crystal design, saves player position and inventory on touch

preBuiltMechanics: CharacterBody2D movement with run/walk speed differentiation
Gravity system with variable jump height (shorter press = lower jump)
Wall slide mechanic: reduced fall speed when touching walls, wall jump ability unlock enables jumping away
Dash ability: directional momentum burst, invincibility frames, 1.5s cooldown when unlocked
Double jump: second air jump when ability unlocked, visual particle feedback
Down smash: downward attack from air, breaks certain platforms, creates shockwave Area2D
Ability state machine: tracks unlocked abilities, prevents usage of locked abilities
Room transition system: fade-out/fade-in transitions when leaving room boundaries, camera panning to new room
Map system: TileMap tracking explored rooms, fog of war mechanism using canvas overlay layer
Enemy AI base class with patrol, chase, attack states using state machine pattern
Boss phase system: health threshold triggers phase change, attack pattern swaps, visual state feedback
Save station: stores player position, health, inventory to dictionary persisted in save file
Gate check system: invisible Area2D nodes block progress until specific ability is acquired (checks ability_manager)
Knockback physics: apply velocity on enemy hit, scales with attack power
Health/damage system: int-based HP, vulnerability frames after hit (temporary invincibility)
customizationPoints: Expand ability tree: add momentum preservation, double-dash, ground pound with range modifier
Room design: create interconnected map layout using room_template as building block, set room spawn positions in room_manager
Enemy variety: create crawler variants (spitter, armored), flyer variants (swooper, turret), custom boss patterns
Ability acquisition: modify ability_orb drops, set room-specific ability gates, create ability progression locks
Visual polish: add screen shake on boss attacks, blood particle effects on damage, visual ability unlock animation
Boss design: expand boss_base.gd phases from 3 to 5+, implement heal phases, minion summon phases
Save system: extend ConfigFile save data to include collected items, percentage completion tracking, playtime
HUD: add compass showing next objective room, ability cooldown radial indicators, combo counter for consecutive hits
Map expansion: create additional interconnected regions, warp points for fast travel, hidden secret rooms with 100% completion bonus
examplePrompts: Create a wall jump ability that launches the player 300 pixels up and 150 pixels away from the wall when activated
Design an enemy crawler variant that spits projectiles every 2 seconds while patrolling; projectiles travel 200 pixels before despawning
Implement a boss with 3 phases: phase 1 fires bullets in spiral pattern, phase 2 dashes at player, phase 3 combines both with increased speed
Add a map screen that displays all rooms in a grid, marks explored rooms in bright color and unexplored in dark with fog of war
Create a dash ability with 1.5 second cooldown, 400 pixel/sec velocity, and temporary invincibility frames during dash duration
